_meta.note: series key -> tomo -> [p1,p2,ca_volume,doc_id(,'s')]; 's' = secondary page system (copy-leaf/Savage numbering)

caveats.25: Bancroft cites this volume by its per-tomo leaf numbers, not the original pages this catalog records (leaf-verified 2026-07-12). Page matches here are provisional; the volume is queued for re-verification.
caveats.26: CONFIRMED leaf-cited (2026-07-13, leaves n11/n12/n37 read): Bancroft cites this volume by its handwritten per-tomo leaf numbers; the gap-read records carry original tomo pages instead. Leaf-verified records are marked; the rest are provisional pending the volume’s re-read.
caveats.14: Bancroft cites this volume BOTH ways — sometimes the original tomo pages, sometimes the copy’s Savage pages under the volume label “xxi.” (verified 2026-07-12). Both systems are indexed; check each candidate’s date against the footnote.
caveats.13: Bancroft cites this volume BOTH ways — usually the original tomo pages, but the 1819 cluster cites the copy’s Savage pages under the volume label “xx.” (content-verified 2026-07-12: xx.63-5, xx.81, xx.85-6). Both systems are indexed; check each candidate’s date against the footnote.
caveats.34: The four Prefecturas y Juzgados sub-volumes are pinned, but this catalog records the copy’s continuous page stamp; each sub-volume’s own document pagination (what a “tom. N, p. N” cite most likely means) is not yet extracted — matches here are approximate. Backfill queued (2026-07-13).
caveats.9: Original pages backfilled 2026-07-14 from the full leaf read (the abstracts’ own “pp. N” notes; continuous 1–1076 across the tomo, leaf-spot-verified at n155/n277). The volume is sectioned by correspondent, so dates are non-monotonic — trust the page match.
caveats.17: Per-tomo original pages backfilled 2026-07-14 (395/400 records — the read pass’s own “Orig. pp.” notes, tomo-prefixed via the pinned zones; date-audit-validated, +7 ok / −10 nohit). The 5 unbackfilled records and the pin-derived leaf side remain approximate.
caveats.44: Bancroft’s “S. José, i. N” = the Savage-copy page N of this volume, not the original pages (leaf-verified 2026-07-12, the 2 Dec 1817 card-games ban at leaf 139). Both systems are indexed.
caveats.55: Bancroft cites the Sacramento tomos by per-tomo Savage leaf numbers (verified 2026-07-12; tomo VI coincides with the volume’s own pages because it comes first). Both systems are indexed.
caveats.61: Bancroft’s Leg. Rec. cites (at least sometimes) use the original junta libro pagination, not the pages this catalog records — the ca59 pattern extended (leaf-proven 2026-07-14: his iii.33-4 = the Feb-1839 district decree, but Savage orig 33-4 = Dec-1835 Vázquez del Mercado docs, leaves n8–n9). Page matches here may land on the wrong document; check dates.
